violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside line coolers and warmer.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan covers in walk in cooler. -Clean fronts of line coolers and warmer.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor edges need more thorough cleaning in kitchen.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoop cup handles were in the product in cinnamon and rice bins.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean both soda dispensers.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean rice and cinnamon bins.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean floor edges, floor drains and undeer equipment.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
